name: GSR — Episode Checklist Auto-Create
description: Triggered by a webhook when a new Episode is created in Notion. Auto-creates the standard production task checklist in the Tasks database.

trigger_setup: Option A: Use Notion's built-in automation to call this webhook when a new Episode page is created
Option B: Use n8n Notion trigger (requires polling) — less immediate
_gsr_notes.known_limitation: Task-to-Episode relations not auto-set in this template (Notion relation API via n8n is complex). Set manually or extend this workflow.
